title: Enterprise Cloud & Hybrid Infrastructure
description: Enterprise infrastructure modernization: cloud migration of a messaging and telephony platform, automated endpoint compliance platform, hybrid identity lifecycle automation, and centralized log aggregation with Elastic Stack.

title: Enterprise SaaS Platform — CI/CD
description: Infrastructure-as-Code and deployment automation for an enterprise SaaS platform. Built CI/CD pipeline for reproducible multi-environment deployments, led enterprise customer implementations.

title: SmallCapTrader
description: Full-stack algorithmic trading platform with multiple built-in strategies, a beam search rule-mining engine for automated strategy discovery and live promotion, and dual-mode architecture (monolithic/sharded) with multi-broker execution.
